closure_candidate: maximal real diagonal multiplication operator on l2 with domain sum lambda_n^2 |x_n|^2 < infinity

eigenvalue_law.growth_statement: For fixed finite sector/chirality multiplicity, shell minima grow unbounded along k except the protected k=0 shell; complement growth is unbounded in the scaffold law.
eigenvalue_law.multiplicity_structure: finite multiplicity per (k,j) from sector and chirality labels

limitations: This proves the diagonal multiplication-operator foundation in the abstract l2 scaffold.
It does not prove relative boundedness of all BHSM perturbations.
title: BHSM v1.9 Diagonal Reference Operator Report
